positive: A minimalist, high-contrast illustration featuring a majestic celestial body (such as a stylized crescent moon or nebula) intersecting with a stylized, geometric mountain range. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical. Use a vibrant indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted sharply with gold foil accents and deep matte black negative space. The style should be a blend of Art Deco graphic design and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock printing, emphasizing clean lines, powerful silhouettes, and elegant negative space. The overall aesthetic must be sophisticated, modern, and suitable for repeat fabric printing on apparel. Vector-graphic quality, highly detailed.
negative: low resolution, blur, watermark, signature, text, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, mutated, fuzzy, messy, grunge, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, asymmetrical, photographic, photorealism
